title: Dermatology specialties | Aurora Derm
description: Aurora Derm organizes its dermatology specialties in Quito with a clearer way to start through WhatsApp, clinic, or teledermatology.
heading: Dermatology specialties

heroImage.alt: Editorial map of dermatology routes and clinical decisions

introTitle: Find the right route and move today without waiting on the web scheduler
introDeck: These specialties sort what is happening today. If you are unsure where to enter, message us on WhatsApp and we will place clinic, teledermatology, or treatment.

initiatives.title: Practical next moves after you choose the route

featured.title: Comprehensive diagnosis
featured.copy: A complete first read that sets priorities and leaves you with a clear plan after the first visit.

featured.title: Dermatology laser for your case
featured.copy: The right door when you already need to review whether technology or a procedure truly belongs in your care.

featured.title: Teledermatology with a careful clinic handoff
featured.copy: Remote care helps decide whether follow-up at a distance is enough or if it makes sense to see you in clinic soon.

sections.title: If you need a first clinical read
sections.deck: This is where initial diagnosis, inflammatory care, and early lesion review belong when the case is still being sorted.

cards.title: Comprehensive diagnosis
cards.copy: An initial read that sorts risk, priorities, and treatment before anything begins.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea
cards.copy: Flares and sensitivity are managed through medical adjustments based on your actual skin response.

cards.title: Skin cancer
cards.copy: Early lesion review with warning signs and a monitoring plan that is not left for later.

sections.title: If you already need indicated treatment
sections.deck: Technology and procedures for cases with a clear goal, where intensity, recovery, and follow-through need calibration.

cards.title: Dermatology laser
cards.copy: Clear settings for lesions, pigment, or scars, with medical review before and after every session.

cards.title: Chemical peel
cards.copy: A peel calibrated by phototype, sensitivity, and therapeutic goal.

cards.title: Collagen biostimulators
cards.copy: Gradual support for firmness and skin quality, indicated responsibly and reviewed by area.

sections.title: If you need follow-up or a route change
sections.deck: Options for longer follow-up, mixed symptoms, and cases that may begin remotely before deciding on clinic review.

cards.title: Pediatric dermatology
cards.copy: Pediatric care with clear guidance for caregivers, school routines, and daily life.

cards.title: Skin, hair and nails
cards.copy: Integrated care for combined symptoms that need coordinated clinical reading.

cards.title: Teledermatology
cards.copy: Remote guidance helps decide whether online follow-up is enough or if clinic review makes more sense.

initiatives.title: Comparable clinical photos
initiatives.copy: Images taken under similar conditions help us read change with more precision.

initiatives.title: Reopen the route when the flare returns
initiatives.copy: If inflammation or symptoms come back, do not restart from zero. Re-enter through the closest route and adjust the next move.

initiatives.title: Align who supports the care
initiatives.copy: In pediatric or longer routes it helps to align home, school, and follow-up so the plan can actually hold.

initiatives.title: Do not delay a changing lesion
initiatives.copy: If a mole, spot, or lesion changed quickly, that route is no longer watch-and-wait. It needs prompt review.

initiatives.title: Confirm whether technology really adds value
initiatives.copy: Before moving into laser or peels, it helps to confirm goal, recovery, and safety for your skin.

initiatives.title: Combine routes only when they help
initiatives.copy: Mesotherapy, biostimulation, or integrated follow-up are added when they clarify the process, not to duplicate visits.

initiatives.title: Change doors without losing context
initiatives.copy: If the first route stops fitting, move into first visit or integrated follow-up with the case already organized.

initiatives.title: Clinic handoff on time
initiatives.copy: Remote care keeps clear signals for moving into clinic when it is needed.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: If one of these routes already sounds like your case, message us on WhatsApp and we will help place whether clinic, teledermatology, or follow-up fits best.
